digest.component_or_area: rebar config schema + ticket-event signing seam
propositions: Seven settled or retired config keys must be removed from the schema and their behavior hardcoded always-on with no dead back-out branch.
No doc, help text, or release note may reference any removed config key.
verify.completion_floor_active is fully implemented and calibrated and should be enabled in this project's rebar.toml with a monitoring note.
The reconciler's inbound writer _write_event_file bypasses the signing seam and must stamp+sign author fields inline to preserve deferred batch-commit orchestration.
Each ticket-event-writing environment (local dev, AWS review-bot/auto-lander, GitHub Actions reconciler/canary) needs a documented signing-key file-path delivery mechanism.
The require_authenticated flag flip is out of scope; this is signing-identity setup only.
